title: Ability to limit column types on built-in column change trigger

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need the ability to set the column type of the built-in trigger for “when column changes”.

If an action needs to depend on a date changing for example, we want to limit the trigger to just date columns.

I know we could do a webhook and custom trigger. But that just added more backend work, and now its going to use 2 integration actions from the customer account instead of just one.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the request @anon29275264 !!
